title: Polystichopsis sinomiqueliana
taxonomy: Polystichopsis sinomiqueliana is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Polystichopsis, which is a group of ferns. Polystichopsis sinomiqueliana is native to Asia, and its classification is further divided into the family level, order Polypodiales, class Polypodiopsida, and division Pteridophyta. The classification reflects the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics. This fern's classification is significant for its study and identification.
